record.text:
eigenvalue-compass — two studies of directionless curvature.

the compass has a pattern but no center. direction as arrangement, not vector. the eigenvalue at r=3 measures the curve itself — no arrow, no orientation.

forward and backward are the same thing at the fold.

images.alt: compass rose with concentric contour lines, the center a glowing oval of light instead of a point
compass rose drawn in thin lines converging on an empty star-shaped center
